title: IVE - LUCID DREAM (D-6 Pre-release Teaser Image)
body: IVE reveals a pre-release teaser image for their upcoming track, LUCID DREAM, counting down to D-6.

title: IVE - FLU @ Live From Vevo Studios
body: IVE performs 'FLU' live from Vevo Studios, an official YouTube content release.

title: Gaeul's Mood: Vintage Digital Camera Walk in Eulji-ro
body: Gaeul shares her new vintage digital camera and takes viewers on a walk around Eulji-ro in her latest 'Gaeul's Mood' YouTube vlog.

title: IVE ranks #2 in May Idol Brand Reputation
body: IVE holds strong at #2 in the May 2026 Idol Group Brand Reputation rankings, trailing only BTS. The ranking reflects continued high public interest during their world tour.

title: Airport fashion — Departure for overseas schedule
body: Fansite photos of the members departing Incheon Airport.
